coverage_note: Canonical public app dataset is ACARA 2025 official public School Location/Profile records with valid coordinates. Legacy score/rank are optional attached metrics only.

provenance.source: ACARA Data Access Program public School Location/Profile 2025 is the canonical base/map layer.
provenance.rank_scope: Legacy imported rank attached only for deterministic ACARA matches; unknown scope and not an official/national ACARA rank.
provenance.score_scope: Legacy imported score attached only for deterministic ACARA matches; methodology opaque and not an authoritative ACARA measure.
provenance.naplan: Not collected in this phase. The ACARA public Data Access Program profile/location/enrolment files used here do not include NAPLAN result scores.

acara_public_data.source: ACARA Data Access Program public download files
acara_public_data.note: Official ACARA identity, profile and location data is the canonical base table/map layer. Legacy score/rank is retained only as an optional metric layer for matched schools.

fields.local_id: Legacy BetterSchool local_id, present only when a legacy record was deterministically matched to ACARA.
fields.sector: Official ACARA sector value (for example Government, Catholic, Independent).
fields.rank: Legacy imported rank; display as rank in current dataset, not national rank.
fields.score: Legacy imported score; display as current dataset reference value.
fields.acara_matching: In progress: local_id records are mapped to ACARA public records where deterministic name/postcode/state or name/suburb/state matching is unambiguous; ambiguous candidates remain labelled as candidates.
fields.id: Canonical deterministic app identifier based on ACARA acara_sml_id + location_age_id + school_age_id.
fields.legacy_rank: Optional legacy imported rank; display as legacy/current-dataset rank, not official or national.
fields.legacy_score: Optional legacy imported score; display as legacy/current-dataset reference value, not official or national.
fields.legacy_metric_status: available when legacy score/rank are attached; unavailable for official ACARA-only schools; ambiguous_unmatched for ACARA candidates tied to an ambiguous legacy match.
